mods.name: Performance Intake
mods.description: An upgraded intake for the EA888 Gen 3 engine with IS38 turbo. Improves turbo sound and provides marginally better airflow.
mods.installNotes: Remove stock airbox. Install new intake with carbon fiber or aluminum housing. Ensure MAF sensor is secure. 15 minutes. No tune required.

mods.name: Catback Exhaust (Valved)
mods.description: A valved catback lets you toggle between quiet mode and full volume. The Golf R deserves to be heard when you want it.
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from the downpipe flange. Valved systems wire to the factory drive mode switch or Bluetooth remote. Dual exit or quad tip options. 1.5 hours.

mods.name: Lowering Springs
mods.description: Lower the Golf R by 20–25mm for improved handling and a more aggressive look. DCC adaptive dampers remain functional with compatible springs.
mods.installNotes: DCC-compatible springs required for adaptive damper cars. Spring compressor needed. All four corners. Alignment mandatory. 2 hour job.

mods.name: Stage 1 ECU + TCU Tune
mods.description: Stage 1 tuning adds 60–80hp to the Golf R with zero hardware changes. DSG tune is essential — transforms shift behavior and removes torque limiting.
mods.partNumbers: APR Stage 1 ECU+TCU, EQT Stage 1 via Cobb AccessPort
mods.installNotes: Flash via OBD-II. DSG/TCU tune is as important as the engine tune — it removes the torque limiter and sharpens shifts. Requires 93 octane. Transforms the car from fast to genuinely quick.

mods.name: Performance Downpipe
mods.description: Replace the restrictive factory downpipe for faster IS38 turbo spool and 20–30hp gains over Stage 1 with a Stage 2 tune.
mods.partNumbers: CTS Turbo MK7R Downpipe, Integrated Engineering Catted DP
mods.installNotes: Access from below on a lift. Pre-soak turbo outlet bolts. Must retune to Stage 2 after install. Catless needs software fix for CEL. 2 hours.

mods.name: Upgraded Intercooler
mods.description: The stock intercooler with plastic end tanks is the Golf R's weakest link. An upgraded unit maintains power consistency and prevents heat soak.
mods.installNotes: Remove front bumper. Swap stock intercooler for upgraded unit with aluminum end tanks. Critical upgrade for Stage 2+ and essential for track use. 2–3 hours.

mods.name: Hybrid Turbo (IS38+)
mods.description: A hybrid turbo upgrade pushes the Golf R beyond the IS38's 400hp limit, supporting 450–550hp on the EA888 Gen 3 platform.
mods.partNumbers: TTE475 Hybrid Turbo, Pure Turbos PURE 500
mods.installNotes: Hybrid turbos use the stock manifold and housing with upgraded internals. Requires HPFP upgrade, larger injectors, intercooler, and custom tune. DSG clutch pack upgrade needed at 450+ hp. 10+ hours.

mods.name: Coilover Suspension
mods.description: Adjustable coilovers maximize the Golf R's AWD chassis with precise ride height and damping control for street or track use.
mods.partNumbers: KW V3 35280069, Ohlins Road & Track BMS MI00S1
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement. DCC module delete or bypass required. Set ride height 15–20mm below stock. Stiffer rear springs help rotate the AWD chassis. Full alignment required.
